title: Looking for Category Manager at OYO Rooms

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at OYO Rooms
jsonLd.description:
Join the OYO Rooms family as a Category Manager in Thane. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About OYO Rooms:
OYO Rooms is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with OYO Rooms!
